name: Candied Yams
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the yams and discard the liquid.
2. Arrange the yams in a baking dish.
3. Pour the orange juice over the yams.
4. Sprinkle the brown sugar liberally on top of the yams.
5. Dot the yams with butter.
6. If desired, sprinkle the miniature marshmallows on top.
7. Place the orange slices on top of the yams.
8. Bake for 30 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit or in any oven temperature (i.e., right along with the turkey) until the marshmallows have melted and the liquid is bubbly.
Serves 6.
